case_title: JOUDA DAR IBRAHIM VS. JOSE ALFARO ARGUMEDO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-17-2016 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF IBRAHIM, JOUDA DAR IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ARGUMEDO, JOSE ALFARO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $65.00) SERVED JAN-04-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ARGUMEDO, JOSE ALFARO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-17-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-17-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES; COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH LANGUAGE INTERPRETER KENNETH WRIGHT APPEARS AND ASSISTS DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED BY THE COURT. CLERK M.L. MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED (D506).
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY IBRAHIM, JOUDA DAR AS TO DEFENDANT ARGUMEDO, JOSE ALFARO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-17-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-17-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO FEB-17-2016 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
